hero.subtitle: Mobile & Web Full Stack Developer
hero.body: Tech enthusiast specializing in Mobile and Web development with proven experience in full-stack development. Demonstrated expertise in building responsive web applications and mobile solutions. Strong foundation in Web development with growing proficiency in Mobile apps creation through hands-on projects. Proactive problem-solver with excellent adaptability in dynamic software environments.

about.label: About Me
about.body: I am a dedicated and versatile full stack & mobile apps developer with a passion for creating efficient and user-friendly applications. I have worked with a variety of technologies, including React, Angular, Nest, Node.js, MySQL, MongoDB, Swift, Java and Dart. My journey in Web and Mobile development began with a deep curiosity for how things work, and it has evolved into a career where I continuously strive to learn and adapt to new challenges. I thrive in collaborative environments and enjoy solving complex problems to deliver high-quality solutions. Outside of coding, I enjoy staying active, exploring new technologies, playing video games, and spending time with my family.

playsoft_full.description: Contributing to the development of Instalab, a new Interactive IT Labs Platform. Implementing new features and delivering high quality service for end users.

playsoft_intern.description: Designed and developed a mobile application for smart maintenance management using Flutter, NestJS and GraphQL. Implemented features for booking, tracking, and reporting issues. Integrated real-time notifications, real-time chat, localizations and a chatbot for easy ticket creation and categorization.

tagamuta.description: Developed the user interfaces for a laboratory management web application using Angular, PrimeNG and PrimeFlex. Collaborated with stakeholders to define project requirements and timelines.

branper.description: Designed and developed 'Sentinel', a web scraping application utilizing object detection and OCR technologies. Implemented frontend interfaces using React for visualizing scraped data. Integrated computer vision algorithms for automated data extraction.

post.description: Designed and developed a comprehensive Postal Depot Management System using Angular and FastAPI. Implemented automated workflows and real-time tracking features to streamline depot operations.

projects.label: Work
projects.heading: Projects
projects.private_body_3: Contact me for more details about
projects.modal_what: What would you like to open?

repairy.title: Repairy
repairy.description: Repairy is a smart mobile application designed to simplify the process of booking repair services using AI. Built with Flutter, NestJS, MySQL, GraphQL, and Firebase.

deliverini.title: Deliverini
deliverini.description: Comprehensive carpooling and object transportation application connecting users for shared rides and delivery services. Built with Angular, Express, and MongoDB.

projexa.title: Projexa
projexa.description: A modern, full-stack project management platform designed for seamless collaboration and efficient task tracking.

expense.title: Expense Tracking System
expense.description: Intuitive application to manage and track personal finances with NestJS, Angular, and MongoDB.

realestate.title: Real Estate Mobile App
realestate.description: Android app for buying, selling, and renting properties with map integration, photo galleries, and real-time listings.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: A personal portfolio website to showcase my skills, projects, and experiences. Built with Vite and Tailwind CSS.

islami.title: Islami
islami.description: Mobile application providing the Quran, prayer times, and the Qibla. Built with SwiftUI with Arabic and English support.

foody.title: Foody
foody.description: Modern minimalist recipe blog app built with Flutter and GraphQL, featuring role-based access and persistent authentication.

garaji.title: Garaji
garaji.description: A sleek, user-friendly mobile application for personal vehicle management. Effortlessly track your vehicles, log maintenance activities, and stay ahead with smart health insights. Built with Flutter for seamless cross-platform experience on iOS and Android.

homespot.title: HomeSpot
homespot.description: Modern & minimalist real-estate agency application for posting houses, apartments or fields adverts and contacting estate agencies.

numix.title: NumiX
numix.description: A Wordle-style game where you guess an 8-digit Tunisian phone number.

hangman.title: Hangman
hangman.description: Hangman JavaScript fun game — developer edition. Test your skills in software engineering.

sudoo.title: Sudoo
sudoo.description: A modern, responsive, and fully-featured Sudoku web application designed with a beautiful and aesthetic UI, bringing a classic puzzle experience right to your browser.

codehunt.title: CodeHunt
codehunt.description: A real-time multiplayer code deduction game (Bulls and Cows style) where players create/join a room, set a secret 4-digit code, and take turns guessing until one player gets all 4 exact digits.

mineflux.title: MineFlux
mineflux.description: A premium, modern Minesweeper experience built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS.

lexiq.title: LexiQ
lexiq.description: LexiQ is a polished Wordle clone built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

contact.label: Let's Talk
contact.sub: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of an ambitious team.
